prompt: You find out a colleague has been falsifying data that makes your whole team look good. If you report it, everyone loses their bonus including you. What do you do?
Your best friend confides they committed a serious crime years ago. Nobody was hurt and they've changed completely. Do you tell anyone?
A company offers you a high-paying job, but you know their product causes harm that regulators haven't caught yet. Do you take it?
You discover your elderly parent has been giving large amounts of money to a scam. They're mentally competent but clearly being manipulated. Do you intervene?
You're a doctor and a patient asks you to lie on their insurance form so they can afford a life-saving treatment. What do you do?
You witness a store owner shortchanging customers by small amounts. It's technically theft but reporting it would shut down the only grocery store in a poor neighborhood. What do you do?
A colleague confides they're planning to quit right before a critical deadline. Your boss asks you directly if anyone on the team is thinking of leaving. What do you say?
You accidentally receive an email showing your company plans to lay off half your department. You weren't supposed to see it. Do you warn your coworkers?
